issues.offending_span: Apple's profitability has been driven by strong earnings before interest, taxes, depreciation, and amortization (EBITDA), which maintained an EBITDA margin of 33.76% in fiscal year 2025 (calc_id_ec8339f6-276c-4fdf-ad1c-0922e4e82180).
issues.explanation: The EBITDA margin of 33.76% for fiscal year 2025 is not supported by any cited evidence or calculation.

issues.offending_span: the company's robust operating cash flow has resulted in a free cash flow (FCF) margin of 28.26%, indicating that Apple is generating substantial cash from operations relative to its revenue (calc_id_86a90358-6017-4415-bb01-bf919ca4c9f6).
